messages.content:
can you help me to rewrite below information. it is CV self-introduction that has been working for 9 years in HR position: 	Professional background: Master’s degree in International Business Management with a specialization in Human Resource Management from University of Tasmania (QS Top 300), Australia. Have worked for 9 years in HR-related fields, including foreign and private enterprises, and have experience in industries such as testing and inspection, consulting, finance, commerce, and hotel.
	Professional Capability: Fluent speaker of Cantonese, Mandarin and English can be working language. Skilled in various HR management tasks like recruitment, training, performance appraisal, and employee relations. Have a good understanding of HR workflow and possess knowledge in developing and optimizing HR systems and processes. Also, familiar with HR-related laws and regulations.
	Learning Ability: Lifelong learning advocator, continuous self-improvement through reading and online materials to learn human resource related laws and regulations on daily life.
	Personality: Outgoing, open-minded and rigorous. Strong sense of responsibility, good at communication and coordination skills, work well in teams and adapt to changes in people and organizations. Thrive under pressure, have a problem-solving mindset, and embrace challenges.

Rewritten:

With a Master's degree in International Business Management specializing in Human Resource Management from the University of Tasmania (QS Top 300), Australia, I have accumulated 9 years of experience in HR-related fields. My diverse work background includes employment in foreign and private enterprises across industries such as testing and inspection, consulting, finance, commerce, and hotel management.

Proficient in English, Cantonese, and Mandarin, I am skilled in various HR management tasks, including recruitment, training, performance appraisal, and employee relations. I possess a comprehensive understanding of HR workflows and have expertise in developing and optimizing HR systems and processes. Additionally, I am well-versed in HR-related laws and regulations.

As a lifelong learner, I actively engage in continuous self-improvement by reading and consuming online materials related to human resource laws and regulations.

In terms of personality, I am outgoing, open-minded, and rigorous. I exhibit a strong sense of responsibility and excel in communication and coordination. I am adept at working collaboratively in teams and thrive in adaptive environments. I am comfortable working under pressure, possess a problem-solving mindset, and readily embrace challenges.

please rewrite Hi, this is <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, am currently working as a HR Supervisor in China Mainland.

I am actively looking for HR Supervisor or above positions, should your company or networks currently hiring similar positions/roles, please feel free to contact me, great thanks!


Hi, this is <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, am currently working as a HR Supervisor in China.

I used to work and live in Hobart, am currently looking for similar positions/roles in Australia, should your company or networks hiring overseas HR talents, please feel free to contact me, great thanks!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Hi, this is Catherine, HR Supervisor from Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten, we are currently looking for suitable expat teacher for July 2024 semester, should you or your networks interested, please feel free to contact me, great thanks!

Hi, I'm <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, currently employed as an HR Supervisor in Mainland China.

I am actively seeking HR Supervisor or higher positions. If your company or network is currently recruiting for similar roles, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you!

Hi, I'm <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>. I have previous experience working and residing in Hobart and I am currently seeking similar positions in Australia. If your company or network is hiring overseas HR professionals, please feel free to contact me. Thank you!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Catherine, an HR Supervisor at Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten. We are currently in search of an expat teacher for the July 2024 semester. If you or anyone in your network is interested, please don't hesitate to contact me. Thank you!

rewrite: Hi, this is Catherine, HR Supervisor from Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten, we are currently looking for suitable expat teacher for July 2024 semester, should you or your networks interested, please feel free to contact me, great thanks!

Hello, my name is Catherine and I am an HR Supervisor at Guangzhou Inspire Academy Kindergarten. We are currently actively seeking a qualified expat teacher for the July 2024 semester. If you or anyone in your network is interested in this opportunity, please feel free to reach out to me. Thank you very much!

rewrite: 	Process construction: Focused on optimizing staff management process, analyze and streamline the working processes of various positions such as human resources, school doctor, teaching assistant, early year educator etc., Aimed to standardize daily work and enhance the work efficiency of each position; 
	Recruitment of expat teachers: Responsible for the recruitment and management of expat teachers in Ersha and Huadu campuses, collect their recruitment demands, build up recruitment strategies, shortlist suitable resumes, and provide post-employment supports to suitable candidates (e.g. conduct background checks, verify qualifications, coordinate with relevant departments for visa and work permit processing, and arrange necessary onboarding procedures). During which a maximum of 5 people were recruited monthly.
	Procedures: Responsible for the work visa, work certificate, domestic and foreign work permission and other documents for 10 foreign teachers, and work visa extension, cancellation and so on.
	Transfer in and transfer out: Responsible for the transfer in and transfer out of the staff, assist the department leader to communicate the work performance and daily performance of foreign teachers, motivate the enthusiasm of foreign teachers, and properly persuade foreign teachers who do not meet the employment conditions to leave.
	Work coordination: With the demands of the principal person in charge of each department of the campus in daily, assisting related personnel to communicate with foreign teachers to ensure the information is well transferred.

- Streamlining Staff Management Processes: Focused on optimizing the management processes for various positions such as human resources, school doctor, teaching assistant, and early year educator. Analyzed and streamlined workflows to standardize daily operations and improve work efficiency for each role.

- Expat Teacher Recruitment: Took charge of recruiting and managing expat teachers for Ersha and Huadu campuses. Collected recruitment needs, developed strategies, screened resumes, and provided post-employment support for suitable candidates (including background checks, qualification verification, visa and work permit coordination, and onboarding procedures). Successfully recruited up to 5 teachers on a monthly basis.

- Documentation and Visa Processing: Oversaw work visas, work certificates, domestic and foreign work permissions, and other related documents for 10 foreign teachers. Managed visa extensions, cancellations, and other necessary procedures.

- Staff Transfers: Facilitated the smooth transfer of staff members, including foreign teachers. Assisted department leaders in communicating performance feedback and daily evaluations to improve motivation. Handled the proper resignation process for foreign teachers who did not meet employment conditions.

- Work Coordination: Collaborated with campus department heads to ensure effective communication between foreign teachers and relevant personnel. Ensured seamless information transfer to meet the demands of the campus's principal figures.

please rewrite and brief the self introduction into 2 paragraphs: With a Master’s degree in International Business Management specializing in Human Resource Management from the University of Tasmania (QS Top 300), Australia, I have accumulated 9 years of experience in HR-related fields. My diverse work background includes employment in foreign and private enterprises across industries such as testing and inspection, consulting, finance, commerce, and hotel management.

Proficient in English, Cantonese, and Mandarin, I am skilled in various HR management tasks, including recruitment, training, performance appraisal, and employee relations. I possess a comprehensive understanding of HR workflows and have expertise in developing and optimizing HR systems and processes. 

As a lifelong learner, I actively engage in continuous self-improvement by reading and consuming online materials related to human resource laws and regulations.

In terms of personality, I am outgoing, open-minded, and rigorous. I exhibit a strong sense of responsibility and excel in communication and coordination. I am adept at working collaboratively in teams and thrive in adaptive environments. I am comfortable working under pressure, possess a problem-solving mindset, and readily embrace challenges.

I hold a Master's degree in International Business Management, specializing in Human Resource Management, from the University of Tasmania. With 9 years of experience in HR-related fields, I have worked in diverse industries, including testing and inspection, consulting, finance, commerce, and hotel management, both in foreign and private enterprises. This breadth of experience has equipped me with a comprehensive understanding of HR workflows and systems.

Being proficient in English, Cantonese, and Mandarin, I possess strong skills in various HR management tasks, such as recruitment, training, performance appraisal, and employee relations. I am dedicated to continually enhancing my knowledge and staying updated on human resource laws and regulations through continuous learning and self-improvement.

As a person, I am outgoing, open-minded, and rigorous. I hold a strong sense of responsibility and excel in communication and coordination. Working collaboratively in teams is second nature to me, and I thrive in adaptive environments. I am comfortable handling pressure, hold a problem-solving mindset, and approach challenges with enthusiasm and determination.

rewrite: Took charge of recruiting and managing expat teachers for Ersha and Huadu campuses. Collected recruitment needs, developed strategies, screened resumes, and provided post-employment support for suitable candidates (including background checks, qualification verification, visa and work permit coordination, and onboarding procedures). Successfully recruited up to 5 teachers on a monthly basis

In my role, I assumed responsibility for the recruitment and management of expat teachers at the Ersha and Huadu campuses. This encompassed various tasks such as gathering recruitment requirements, strategizing recruitment efforts, evaluating resumes, and offering comprehensive post-employment assistance to selected candidates. This support included conducting background checks, verifying qualifications, coordinating visa and work permit procedures, and facilitating smooth onboarding processes. Notably, I achieved consistent monthly success in recruiting up to 5 teachers.

rewrite: responsible for the recruitment and management of expat teachers at the Ersha and Huadu campuses. Adjust recruitment strategies based on interview outcomes, and offer comprehensive post-employment assistance to selected candidates. I achieved consistent monthly success in recruiting up to 5 teachers

As the person in charge, I held the responsibility for recruiting and managing expat teachers at both the Ersha and Huadu campuses. This involved developing and adjusting recruitment strategies based on interview outcomes, ensuring the selection of suitable candidates. Additionally, I provided comprehensive post-employment assistance to the selected teachers, supporting them throughout their onboarding process and settling into their new roles. Notably, I achieved a consistent track record of successfully recruiting up to 5 teachers on a monthly basis.

rewrite: Focused on optimizing the management processes for various positions such as school doctor, teaching assistant, and early year educator. Analyzed and streamlined workflows to standardize daily operations and improve work efficiency for each role

My main focus was on optimizing management processes for positions including school doctor, teaching assistant, and early year educator. I conducted thorough analysis and streamlining of workflows to standardize daily operations and enhance work efficiency for each role. By identifying areas for improvement and implementing streamlined procedures, I succeeded in creating standardized processes that improved the overall efficiency of these positions.

rewrite: Oversaw work visas, work certificates, domestic and foreign work permissions, and other related documents for 10 foreign teachers. Managed visa extensions, cancellations, and other necessary procedures

I had the responsibility of overseeing the documentation process for work visas, work certificates, domestic and foreign work permissions, and other relevant documents for a total of 10 foreign teachers. In addition, I managed all aspects of visa extensions, cancellations, and other necessary procedures, ensuring compliance with regulations and timely completion of paperwork. By efficiently handling these administrative tasks, I ensured a smooth and seamless process for the foreign teachers' visa requirements.
